content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Closed the two pending lifecycle amendments. In the CLI, stale-claim recovery now reconciles durable terminal journal outcomes before rewriting a Running snapshot: run resume no longer downgrades a journal-completed run into Failed, and run stop now preserves durable run_completed/run_failed outcomes instead of always forcing an interruption failure. In the run-status reconciliation path, terminal journal reconciliation is now attempt-aware for reused run IDs, so older run_failed/run_completed events from a pre-resume attempt no longer override an active resumed attempt. Added CLI and unit regressions covering same-run-id resume boundaries plus completed-journal preservation during stale resume/stop recovery.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Updated src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs so Running-snapshot journal reconciliation first finds the latest run_started/run_resumed boundary for the snapshot run_id and only trusts terminal events from that current attempt.
2. [Completed] Patched src/cli/run.rs stale-owner recovery so claimed resume/stop flows reconcile durable run_failed/run_completed outcomes before any stale interruption rewrite, preserving completed runs and avoiding false resumability.
3. [Completed] Added regression coverage in tests/cli.rs for same-run-id resumed status reporting plus stale resume/stop preservation of durable run_completed outcomes.
4. [Completed] Added unit coverage in tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs for attempt-aware status reconciliation and ran targeted plus broad validation to confirm the fixes and capture remaining unrelated failures.

## Validation Evidence

- cargo fmt --check passed.
- cargo test --test cli run_status_ignores_terminal_journal_events_before_latest_resume_for_same_run_id -- --exact passed.
- cargo test --test cli run_stop_preserves_completed_journal_outcome_for_stale_running_snapshot -- --exact passed.
- cargo test --features test-stub --test cli run_resume_preserves_completed_journal_outcome_for_stale_running_snapshot -- --exact passed.
- cargo test --features test-stub status_reconciliation_ignores_terminal_events_before_latest_resume_boundary -- --nocapture passed.
- cargo test passed for src/lib.rs, tests/cli.rs, and tests/run_attach_tmux.rs, but failed in tests/unit.rs only on the pre-existing checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_creates_finds_and_resets_checkpoint_commits failure.
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings failed only on pre-existing repository-wide lint findings outside this lifecycle patch set.

## Outstanding Risks

- cargo test is still not fully green because of the pre-existing unrelated failure checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_creates_finds_and_resets_checkpoint_commits in tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs (find checkpoint: Io(Os { code: 2, kind: NotFound, message: "No such file or directory" })).
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings is still blocked by pre-existing repository-wide lint debt outside this change set, including findings in src/adapters/fs.rs, src/cli/project.rs, src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs, src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs, src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs, src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs, src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs, and src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs.
- The worktree already had unrelated live-state changes under .ralph-burning/projects/rlm/ before this pass; those files were left untouched.
